diversity_experiment.purpose: AutoGluon Tabular diversity candidate using the same rolling time folds and context-offer feature policy as the current GBM candidates.
diversity_experiment.selection_gate: Keep only if Fold3 is competitive and rank-blend with champion/XGB improves Fold3 and late-holdout metrics.
forbidden_shortcuts: Do not use AutoGluon internal leaderboard as the primary validation metric.
Do not use the 45032-row sample_submission policy.
Do not add supervised encodings outside rolling folds.
